Other: 0800: Sent a working party on shore in charge of P. F. Churchill, (Acting Ensign), to remove the bodies of the seamen who were killed in the assault on Fort Fisher, Dec. 15, 1865,  they having been buried below high water mark.

I chose to ignore is DR lat/long. It makes for a strange voyage from here to 0800 on the 25th.
It looks like he gets underway around 7:30. He logs nothing until 1300 but still has Wxs and a distance of 8 Kts.
It seems reasonable that once he was underway, he maintained WxS 8 from 0900-1300.

Other: 0350: At 0350 Hove up Starbd anchor and went to sea in Company with USS Bibb to cruise for 2 Boats and a raft with passengers from the Str Republic which vessel foundered on Wednesday, Oct 25th, ExS 100 miles from the Light Ship off Port Royal.

Other: 2120: At 9:20, the sky, (at that time covered with thick clouds & having every appearance of rain), suddenly became illuminated with an intense light which shone brilliantly during 3 seconds so that objects on the horizon could be discerned as distinctly as at noonday. Three minutes after, a very heavy report was heard which seemed to be going from West to East. Suppose it to be the falling of some meteoric substance.
